name: Volcengine Ark
author: moshoujingli
description: LLM provider via Volcengine Ark. Auto model discovery, thinking toggle, OpenAI-compatible chat completions. Credentials stored in macOS Keychain.

descriptions.de: LLM-Anbieter via Volcengine Ark. Automatische Modellerkennung, Thinking-Schalter, OpenAI-kompatible Chat-Completions. Anmeldedaten werden im macOS Schlüsselbund gespeichert.
descriptions.zh-Hans: 通过火山引擎 (方舟) 接入 LLM。自动模型发现、思考开关、Chat Completions 接口。凭证存储在 macOS Keychain 中。
